title: Moonshot 发布并开源 Kimi-K2.7-Code 编程模型
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Chubby♨️
@kimmonismus
Moonshot just released Kimi-K2.7 code, a huge upgrade to Kimi-K2.6!
Big jump over K2.6:
+21.8% on Kimi Code Bench v2
+11.0% on Program Bench
+31.5% on MLS Bench Lite
It also uses 30% fewer reasoning tokens, follows instructions better, and improves long-horizon coding tasks.
6x High-Speed Mode is coming soon.
Good to see open source competition catching up
Kimi.ai
@Kimi_Moonshot
19h
🌘 Kimi-K2.7-Code, our latest coding model, is now released and open-sourced!
🔷 Improved coding & agent performance over K2.6: +21.8% on Kimi Code Bench v2, +11.0% on Program Bench, and +31.5% on MLS Bench Lite.
🔷 Reasoning efficiency: Less overthinking, with 30% lower Show more
12:51 PM · Jun 12, 2026 32.1K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: Moonshot 发布并开源 Kimi-K2.7-Code 编程模型
discovery_record.discovery_summary: Moonshot 发布并开源 Kimi-K2.7-Code 编程模型，相比 K2.6 在多个基准上大幅提升：Kimi Code Bench v2 提高 21.8%，Program Bench 提高 11.0%，MLS Bench Lite 提高 31.5%。推理效率优化，推理 token 使用量降低 30%，指令遵循与长时编码任务成功率提升。即将推出 6 倍高速模式。模型现已通过 Kimi API 和 Kimi Code 开放使用。

key_excerpts.text: Moonshot 发布并开源 Kimi-K2.7-Code 编程模型，相比 K2.6 在多个基准上大幅提升：Kimi Code Bench v2 提高 21.8%，Program Bench 提高 11.0%，MLS Bench Lite 提高 31.5%。推理效率优化，推理 token 使用量降低 30%，指令遵循与长时编码任务成功率提升。即将推出 6 倍高速模式。模型现已通过 Kimi API 和 Kimi Code 开放使用。

7 code, a huge upgrade to Kimi-K2.
5% on MLS Bench Lite It also uses 30% fewer reasoning tokens, follows instructions better, and improves long-horizon coding tasks.

1. [number / daily_observation, heatmap, case, trend / high] Moonshot 发布并开源 Kimi-K2.7-Code 编程模型，相比 K2.6 在多个基准上大幅提升：Kimi Code Bench v2 提高 21.8%，Program Bench 提高 11.0%，MLS Bench Lite 提高 31.5%。推理效率优化，推理 token 使用量降低 30%，指令遵循与长时编码任务成功率提升。即将推出 6 倍高速模式。模型现已通过 Kimi API 和 Kimi Code 开放使用。
2. [product_update / daily_observation, heatmap, change / high] Post Log in Sign up Post Chubby♨️ @kimmonismus Moonshot just released Kimi-K2.
3. [company_action / daily_observation, heatmap, change, case, trend / high] 7 code, a huge upgrade to Kimi-K2.
4. [number / daily_observation, heatmap, case, trend / high] 8% on Kimi Code Bench v2 +11.
5. [number / daily_observation, heatmap, case, trend / high] 0% on Program Bench +31.
6. [number / daily_observation, heatmap, case, trend / high] 5% on MLS Bench Lite It also uses 30% fewer reasoning tokens, follows instructions better, and improves long-horizon coding tasks.
